About Me

Real Estate Marketing
Built on Results

I'm Sarmad Ali — a Real Estate Social Media Specialist based in Hyderabad, Pakistan. I work exclusively with real estate developers, builders, and agencies to build their digital brand and generate qualified leads through strategic content and Meta Ads.

With a proven track record of creating content that reaches 115,000+ people organically — without paid boosts — I understand what it takes to cut through the noise in Pakistan's competitive real estate market.

My work combines AI-powered video production, platform-native content strategy, and data-driven Meta Ad campaigns to deliver real business outcomes — more inquiries, stronger brand positioning, and a pipeline that converts.

META ADS REELS PRODUCTION CONTENT STRATEGY SOCIAL MEDIA KLING AI REAL ESTATE PKT
What I Do

Services Built for Real Estate

Every service is designed specifically for real estate — not generic marketing copy-pasted from another industry.

📱

Real Estate Social Media Management

End-to-end management of your Instagram & Facebook — custom content calendar, daily posting, community engagement, and growth strategy crafted specifically for real estate brands. Your presence, professionally handled.

🎬

Reels & Content Creation

High-impact property reels, cinematic project walkthroughs, and AI-assisted video production using tools like Kling AI and Runway ML. Content that stops the scroll and drives serious buyer inquiries — proven to reach 100K+ organically.

🎯

Meta Ads & Lead Generation

Precision-targeted Facebook & Instagram ad campaigns built for serious real estate results. From audience research and creative to conversion optimization — every rupee of your ad budget works harder for your project.

Success Story

Real Estate Marketing
Success Story

How strategic social media content turned an unknown real estate project into Hyderabad's most talked-about housing scheme.

Client

Rohaan Faraz Villas — Hyderabad Bypass

Real Estate Housing Scheme · Facebook & Instagram Marketing · Organic + Paid Strategy

🔴 The Challenge

A newly launched housing project in Hyderabad with zero digital presence, no brand recognition, and a tight competition from established developers. The client needed immediate visibility, qualified leads, and trust from serious buyers — all on an organic budget.

🟡 The Strategy
  • ✦ Cinematic property tour reels with AI-enhanced production
  • ✦ Platform-native Facebook content strategy
  • ✦ PM Housing Scheme (Ghar Ho Tu Apna) campaign alignment
  • ✦ Consistent brand voice & visual identity
  • ✦ Targeted Meta Ads for serious buyers in Hyderabad
🟢 The Results
Organic Reach 115K+
Reels × 10K+ Reach 5+
Engagement Rate High
Brand Visibility ↑ Major
Campaign Screenshots
